title: 10x Door Handle Cover & Mirror Shell Trim Black For Jeep Grand Cherokee 2011+
bullets: Complete 10-piece trim set includes door handle covers and rearview mirror shell trims for full exterior upgrade coverage
Premium black finish over high-quality ABS construction with UV-resistant coating prevents fading, peeling, and discoloration
Precision-molded to snap directly over factory handles and mirror shells with 3M automotive adhesive tape pre-installed on back
No drilling, cutting, or permanent modification required — installs in minutes with simple peel-and-stick application
Adds a sleek custom appearance while protecting original factory paint and chrome from scratches, chips, and road debris
Custom-fit for 2011 and newer Jeep Grand Cherokee — each piece is contoured to match the exact curvature of factory components
